title: The Schottky–Mott Rule Expanded for Two-Dimensional Semiconductors: Influence of Substrate Dielectric Screening

paper_analysis.summary: The paper studies energy level alignment at monolayer MoS2 interfaces and proposes an expanded Schottky-Mott rule that includes substrate dielectric screening-induced band gap renormalization.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: No explicit dataset or source data is indicated in the available paper metadata. The paper appears to be a theoretical/analytical study of band alignment and substrate dielectric screening in monolayer MoS2, but no associated data files were found.

dataset_characterization.data_organization: No data availability statement was found, and no downloadable data files, supplementary materials, or external repository links were identified on the publisher page.
